claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is at least 6× larger than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Cheetah sprint.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h.

claims.statement: Great Barrier Reef length is at least 6× longer than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are more bones in an adult human body than grams in a kilogram.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 206 bones vs 1,000 g.

viz.labelA: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: First SMS sent happened after Barcode first scanned.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First SMS sent: 1992. Barcode first scanned: 1974.
